use_when: Describe when this preset accelerates a new Lab.
do_not_use_when: Describe situations where this preset would contaminate the request.

starter_observables.name: <observable>
starter_observables.risk: How it can mislead the Lab.

admin_boundaries.boundary: Run from current seed; no direction override without review.

forbidden_labels: Labels or actions that would overstate early-cycle evidence.

e2e_checks.expectation: A completed cycle updates left, center and right dashboard surfaces.

adaptation_questions: What must the meta-lab answer before producing the final Lab?
